name: Vanguard Total International Stock ETF xStock
description: Vanguard Total International Stock ETF xStock (VXUSx) is a tracker certificate issued as a freely transferable token on selected blockchains. VXUSx tracks the price of Vanguard Total International Stock ETF. VXUSx is designed to give eligible investors regulatory-compliant access to the stock price of Vanguard Total International Stock ETF, whilst maintaining the benefits of blockchain technology.
